_comment: Origin -> destination lanes for the arc layer. origin/dest must be hub_codes that exist in hubs.json; corridor is a free-text label shown in the UI. This file was missing from the repo and has been reconstructed from the lane list embedded in the committed docs/data.json sample output (which make_sample_data.py generates FROM this file) — the origin/dest/corridor triples below are the ones that produced that exact sample, so this should match the original intent rather than being a guess.
